vulnerabilities.description: Helmet middleware is not used for setting HTTP headers for security.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware in the express application to set secure HTTP headers.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS is not configured with a whitelist, which can lead to unauthorized domains accessing the API.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure CORS with a specific whitelist of allowed origins using the CORS middleware.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate-limiting is not implemented to control the number of requests a user can make in a time frame.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use a rate-limiting middleware to restrict the number of requests from a single IP address within a certain period.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT secret is not securely handled, potential exposure risk.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that the JWT secret is stored securely and not exposed in logs or public configurations.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization is not explicitly implemented; potential risk of injection attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input sanitization on all incoming requests to prevent SQL and NoSQL injection attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing RBAC/ABAC middleware for checking user permissions.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement a middleware layer that ensures RBAC/ABAC checks for API endpoints, especially those that deal with sensitive data.
